description: CompositionThis grey half sleeve round neck t-shirt is made of 100% cottonFittingSlimWashCare Machine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking. Remove promptly. Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery. ActionA casual t-shirt, is just made to give you utmost comfort, wear it absolutely anywhere for the casual purpose with a pair of nice fitted denims it wont make you feel less stylish.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
